caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a dark gray, sound-absorbing foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small black logo that reads "Stay Static". He is positioned behind a professional microphone mounted on a silver shock mount and boom arm. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his gaze shifting slightly as he looks toward someone or something off-camera. His facial expressions evolve from a neutral, focused look to a slight smile, with his mouth open as he talks. The camera remains stationary, capturing a medium close-up of the man from the chest up as he interacts with an unseen person in the recording environment.
